$purpose: Structured citations for authoritative travel-vaccine and outbreak references the site relies on. Rendered on /about and footer-linked from country/vaccine pages. The fortnightly health-alerts pipeline (scripts/update-health-alerts.mjs) reads alerts_feed_url from each entry where present.

$tier_model.primary: National public-health authorities used as primary co-references alongside CDC. Recommendations here may diverge from CDC and are cited per-country where relevant.
$tier_model.regional: Supranational/regional bodies useful for outbreak surveillance and methodology, less for per-country traveller schedules.
$tier_model.professional: Clinical/professional society references — used for E-E-A-T credibility and methodology citations.

references.name: U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention — Travelers' Health
references.scope: Per-country recommendations, Yellow Book clinician text, travel health notices.
references.license_note: U.S. federal government work — public domain in the United States; cite as required outside the US.

references.name: World Health Organization — International Travel and Health
references.scope: Global travel-vaccine recommendations, IHR yellow-fever entry requirements, Disease Outbreak News (DON).
references.license_note: WHO content is licensed under CC BY-NC-SA 3.0 IGO. Attribution required.

references.name: UK National Travel Health Network and Centre — TravelHealthPro
references.scope: Per-country recommendations and outbreak surveillance for UK clinicians and travellers.
references.license_note: Contains public sector information licensed under the Open Government Licence v3.0.

references.name: Public Health Agency of Canada — Travel.gc.ca
references.scope: Per-country travel advisories, tiered travel health notices (Levels 1–4), Canadian Immunization Guide.
references.license_note: Crown copyright — reproduction permitted for non-commercial purposes per Government of Canada Terms.

references.name: Australian Department of Health, Disability and Ageing — Immunisation Handbook & Smartraveller
references.scope: Australian Immunisation Handbook (clinical), Smartraveller per-country advisories (consumer).
references.license_note: Commonwealth of Australia material — generally CC BY 4.0 unless otherwise marked.

references.name: European Centre for Disease Prevention and Control
references.scope: EU/EEA outbreak surveillance (Communicable Disease Threats Report), European Vaccination Information Portal, ECDC Vaccine Scheduler.
references.license_note: ECDC reuse permitted with attribution; see https://www.ecdc.europa.eu/en/copyright.

references.name: International Society of Travel Medicine
references.scope: Peer society; publishes the Journal of Travel Medicine (Oxford) and runs GeoSentinel surveillance for traveller-acquired infections.
references.license_note: Society publication — cite Journal of Travel Medicine articles individually; no public alerts feed.
